caption: The video features an elderly man with white hair tied back, wearing glasses and a traditional-style shirt adorned with eagle motifs and a colorful band across the chest. He stands at a podium, speaking into a microphone, likely addressing an audience. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background. The man is holding some papers or notes in his hand, suggesting he is delivering a prepared speech or presentation. The atmosphere seems formal yet intimate, possibly a community gathering or a cultural event. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, indicating the organization or context of the event.
